404 L1E L1E_INFLAMED_GUM (L1E) Inflamed/Swollen/Bleeding Gums CHAR 1 Oral/dental status: oral status and disease prevention - inflamed/bleeding gums, oral abscesses, etc. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
405 L1F L1F_DAY_TEETH_CLEAN (L1F) Daily Cleaning of Teeth/Dentures CHAR 1 Oral/dental status: oral status and disease prevention - daily cleaning teeth/dentures or mouth care. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
406 L1G L1G_NONE_ABOVE (L1G) None of Above Oral Status CHAR 1 Oral/dental
